Page's own §7 table: '0001 — Turbopuffer search/RAG store' is explicitly an unfiled ADR-drafting action ('this architecture names the triggers, it does not create the ADR pages... filing them is an OPEN action' — human Studio Act-1 step, not an engineering ticket). Coverage-index's literal 'ADR-0004'->['gapfix'] key is a false-alias for a different, unrelated contracts-space ADR (cell-lint trailer rule, GABwtTr4pp) — confirmed no matching key exists for ADR-0001. Underlying trigger (D-S9/A2/A3, Turbopuffer commitment) IS built via E2-S1/E2-S2/E2-S3, but the ADR-filing artifact itself is out of build scope.

Underlying trigger (D-S12/A2) IS built via E2-S1, but ADR filing is a human doc action outside this delivery program's ticket scope.

Underlying trigger (A4/A12) IS built via E2-S4/E10-S2, but this page's ADR-0004 document is unfiled.
